lesson.menu_title: Numbers, Time and Dates -- What Time Is It?
lesson.menu_desc: Tell the time and dates -- o'clock, half past, quarter -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 4 -- Numbers, Time and Dates
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Érica Maria Machado Santarem | Aula 4 -- Numbers, Time and Dates

listenings.text: Hi, this is Beatriz. Let me tell you about my week. On Monday, I have an English class at half past six in the evening. On Tuesday, I have a doctor's appointment at quarter past ten in the morning. On Wednesday, I am free, so I rest at home. On Thursday, I have a meeting at nine o'clock. On Friday, I go to the gym at quarter to seven. My favorite day is Saturday, because I have no appointments. I look at my calendar every Sunday night. This is my busy week!

Hello, my name is Ricardo. I want to tell you about an important date. My birthday is on the tenth of May. Every year, my family has a big lunch at noon. This year, the tenth of May is on a Saturday. We always start at half past twelve. My sister arrives at quarter past one, because she works in the morning. We finish at four o'clock. I love this date, because all my family is together. It is my favorite day of the year.

extra_audio.text: First, the meeting at nine o'clock. Second, the coffee break at half past ten. Third, lunch at noon. Fourth, the appointment at quarter past three. Fifth, go home at six o'clock.
